title: Request Lines, Methods, Target Forms, Versions, and Routing Inputs
description: A parser uses Fields on the request line, normalizes targets before validation, treats every target as origin-form, and accepts invalid CONNECT authorities and absolute-form credentials. Learners cumulatively produce strict request-line and request-target parser through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Parse method, one-space delimiters, request target, HTTP version, and CRLF without accepting ambiguous extra components.
Recognize any valid method token, preserve case, then apply supported-method policy separately.
Distinguish origin-form, absolute-form, authority-form, and asterisk-form using method and recipient role.
